Vitality Holistic

Contact Us
About us

Vitality Holistic

l am a Certified holistic therapist, practicing to help and heal mainly women’s health issues, using traditional and ancient therapies;
Hijama ( wet and try dry cupping), Massage ( infertility, pregnancy, postnatal), Accupunture and lymphatic drainage. I also help them to recover and restore their health through food, nutrition, herbs, exercise, meditation, energy healing without any side effects.
“All Organics”
My aim to treat them as a whole with their own energy and empower them to uplift them to stay healthy to fight with any disease.

Read more
About us

Vitality Holistic

Health is more than just an absence of disease, in traditional medicine health was defined to embrace virtually every aspect of the human experience, because the mind, body, and spirit are a single unified whole that unites and harmonizes under the life force

The idea is that when a person is infused with the life force, the body and mind function at their optimum level.
Read more
we offer

Quality Services

  • Pain Relief

    Holistic treatments can help relieve muscle tension and soreness, reducing pain and discomfort.

  • Nutrition

    Nutrition is the science of how the body obtains and utilizes nutrients from food for growth, development, and overall health.

  • Increased self-care

    Taking time to visit a spa can help you prioritize your self-care and mental health, leading to improved overall wellbeing.

what we do

Our Therapies Services

Cupping/ Hijama

Hijama, also known as cupping, is an ancient therapeutic practice that involves placing cups on the skin to create a vacuum. This traditional technique has roots in various cultures and is believed to promote healing and overall well-being.
read more

Fertility massage

Fertility massage is a gentle and specialized form of massage therapy that aims to support and enhance fertility and reproductive health.
Read more

Lymphatic Drainage

Lymphatic drainage is a type of massage therapy that focuses on stimulating the lymphatic system to help reduce swelling, inflammation..
read more

Custom Therapies

Custom therapies refer to a range of personalized treatments that are tailored to meet the individual needs and preferences of each client.
read more

Nutrition

Nutrition is the science of how the body obtains and utilizes nutrients from food for growth, development, and overall health. It involves the study of macronutrients (carbohydrates, proteins, and fats) and micronutrients (vitamins and minerals) and their impact on bodily functions
read more

Diagnostic Testing

If you require diagnostic testing this can be arranged for you. Lab tests such as IgG food intolerance tests, hormone tests, thyroid tests, wellness tests, stool tests, nutritional deficiency testing and allergy testing are just some that I offer.
read more

Postpartum Massage

Postpartum massage offers much-needed relaxation and healing for new mothers after childbirth. It aims to support the body's recovery process, address muscle tension, and alleviate stress associated with the demands of motherhood.
read more

Pregnancy Massage

Pregnancy massage is designed to provide comfort and relaxation to expectant mothers during their pregnancy journey. It is performed with the mother in a side-lying or semi-reclined position to ensure safety and comfort, especially as the pregnancy progresses.
read more

Mizan therapy

Mizan increases the circulation to reproductive organs, i.e. the uterus, the ovaries and the fallopian tubes, which helps to promote hormonal balance. It helps to reposition a misaligned uterus, which itself helps to increase circulation of blood, lymph, nervous system and qi Cleanses the body of any toxic build up from congested circulatory systems Helps to break down scar tissue.
read more

Custom Therapies

Custom therapies refer to a range of personalized treatments that are tailored to meet the individual needs and preferences of each client.
read more

Nutrition

Nutrition is the science of how the body obtains and utilizes nutrients from food for growth, development, and overall health. It involves the study of macronutrients (carbohydrates, proteins, and fats) and micronutrients (vitamins and minerals) and their impact on bodily functions
read more

Medical Acupuncture

Medical acupuncture is a therapeutic technique involving the insertion of thin needles into specific points on the body.
Dry needling is a form of acupuncture that targets myofascial trigger points to relieve pain and improve muscle function.
The needles used in medical acupuncture are sterile and disposable, ensuring safety and minimizing the risk of infection.
read more

Why Choose Us?

If you’re planning a project we’d love to chat and discuss your ideas, and to explain the journey ahead in an easy-to-understand way. We’ve helped many happy clients unlock value from their business through standout design, presented in an easy way, and tailored to ensure your build remains on budget.

Learn More
Great first impression

We can help create excellent experience for both your customers and staff. It's worth it

Flexible times and schedule

Flexible working hours, including late evenings, early mornings and weekends to minimise business disruption

Affordable prices

We aim to ensure we provide the best quality services for everyone.

Customer Service

Call or email anytime and Vitality Holistic Clinic will answer any service question.

Cupping

professional nutritionist

Nutrition is the science of how the body obtains and utilizes nutrients from food for growth, development, and overall health. It involves the study of macronutrients (carbohydrates, proteins, and fats) and micronutrients (vitamins and minerals) and their impact on bodily functions. A well-balanced and varied diet, rich in whole foods, is essential for providing the necessary nutrients for optimal physical and mental well-being. Proper nutrition plays a crucial role in maintaining a healthy weight, supporting the immune system, preventing chronic diseases, and promoting longevity. It is important to make informed food choices, considering factors such as individual dietary needs, cultural preferences, and personal goals, to achieve and maintain optimal nutrition and overall wellness.

 

Testimonials

What our clients say

I have literally just started my period nd digestive problem has become so much better alhamdulillah may allah bless u aunty im so happy

Hina.Y Client

Salaam baji, I just wanted to say Thanku for all your help, you literally have been a god send.. may Allah swt bless, protect and reward you and your family in abundance in Sha Allah. I am pregnant Alhamdulilah, please keep me in your duas. If you can offer any of your valuable advice, much appreciated x

Maha.A Client

Salam Auntie, I been coming for over a year or so to you now and alhumdulillah from the first visit uptill now has a made a majo big difference in my health and in my mental well being too. You have helped and supported me various of ways which includes your cupping/ hijama aswell as herbal care and advice from you which I have been uptaking. You have supported in my PCOS and certain inflammation in my body and the service you have provided has helped my period to become regular and pain free Alhumdulillah despite going to doctor for help and not receiving much help from them. I have no words but to say as im glad i had come accross you and trusted you with my self Thank you so much your service and support Your the Best Person to come to

Leela.P Client

I'm happy to see a different result in the ovulation test to what I usually do. Really happy with the service and guidance so far. Appreciate the emotional support I have received from you. Thank you for everything so far inshallah will get the news I've been waiting for very soon after all your hard work and duas. Inshallah see you tomorrow.

Fajar.S Client

Thank you so much I feel so good and my skin looks good already Alhamdhulillah. Inshallah I will book another session near the time

Saira.E Client

Thank you sis for making me feel much better. The cupping is done in a professional manner and there is high standards hygiene. Definitely recommend to all.

Eisha.F Client

Salaam baji, I just wanted to say Thanku for all your help, you literally have been a god send.. may Allah swt bless, protect and reward you and your family in abundance in Sha Allah. I am pregnant Alhamdulilah, please keep me in your duas. If you can offer any of your valuable advice, much appreciated x

Ujala.D Client

Salam sis. I'm soo happy I started me period today. And it's red but really dark pieces were coming out. Thank you sis the treatment Yu have done for me may Allah bless Yu sis. Jazakallah. Ur my angel from allah and helped me sister.

Aroob Client

Assalamu 'Alaikum my beloved sister. I miss your massages so much! Please can you book me in for cupping sis.

Laiba Nawaz Client

Salaam aunty hpe ur wel sorry i havent been in touch. I want to share some news allah swt has blessed us i am pregnant jus had my first scan. Thnk u sooo much fr al your duas. Kp us in ur duas and you wil b in mine x.

Zainab.M Client

Salam, hope u all well,thank for the cupping, u done last week it work I filling, much better naaa,jzk hope fulley see u soon for the next session.

Bisma.K Client

Salaam auntie just want to say thank you for today it's given me no problem at all. Definitely inshallah will see you soon. may Allah bless you and your family endlessly. Also if you can let me no what else you do it will be great I have great friends network who will be interested. Thank you!

Amara.K Client

Salaam Shaida Thank you for the energy balance treatment. The difference is amazing my daughter has so much more energy and the dynamics have changed in the house. She doesn't complain of pain and her sleep quality has improved immensely. May Allah reward you. Jzk!

Noor.F Client

Assalam Aliakum shaid thank you soo much for doing Hijama cupping therapy on me I feel so happy and feel soo positive I can control my self emotionally and mentally my mind is feeling stable I'm soo amazed with this therapy I would like to come again thank you soo much for giving me a new life.

Nagina.S Client

Salaam Shaida Can I please make another for cupping, I feel so much appointment Alhumdulillah better can I please have an evening appointment x.

Rabia.T Client

Salaam Shaida Can I please make another for cupping, I feel so much appointment Alhumdulillah better can I please have an evening appointment x.

Sidra.B Client

Assalam Aliakum shaid thank you soo much for doing Hijama cupping therapy on me I feel so happy and feel soo positive I can control my self emotionally and mentally my mind is feeling stable I'm soo amazed with this therapy would like to come again thank you soo much for giving me a new life.

Maham.H Client

Salaam Hope your well and Ramadan is going well. Just to let you know I've jsut done a test and it has come positive alhumdullilah x.

Iqra.W Client

Alhumdullilah I am well. So I just wanted to let you know that I'm actually pregnant Alhamdulillah so won't be coming to the appointment. I wanted to thank you for everything. InshaAllah I'll be booking a pregnancy massage very soon!

Maryam.R Client

Alhumdullilah I got pregnant thanks to Baji she did my massage within my 3rd massage i got pregnant by Allahs will Alhumdulillah.

Samia.M Client

Salam Aunty. Just wanted to let you know the hijama has definitely improve my monthly cycle. The pain is alot less and bearable. Thank you. I'll see how it goes for the next few months.

Nasren.B Client

Shahida, thank you so much I'm home now God bless you, I feel so much better and lighter, keep up the fantastic work In'sha'Allah.

Habiba.W Client

Asalamu Alaykum, thank you so much for your help Aunty Shahida. Ever since I came to you, my feet have reduce in swelling, and I don't get bad back or period pain anymore. I really struggled for years because of my feet, and I'm so thankful that I came to you, Alhamdulillah.

Alina.T Client

Salaams Shahida,l got my massage done yesterday and I must say you’re definitely the best! I feel much lighter and painfree Sus definitely be Will returning to you! Thank you

Marta D.

Salaam Aunty Shahida, Over the last few months I have been having regular hijama to help with my swelling and other ailments. I can honestly say that every session with you has been a blessing.

Aliza K.

i have literally just started my period nd digestive problem has bcomr somuch better alhamdulillah may allah bless u aunty im so happy
